description: Precise step-by-step instructions and other required data for installation of an Eye shield CBM, stored on a data card of proprietary form-factor, designed to be used extensively by an Autodoc, and allowing bionic installation with minimal failure chance.  An integrated security subroutine renders it unusable after a single installation.

Precise step-by-step instructions and other required data for installation of an Diving gear CBM, stored on a data card of proprietary form-factor, designed to be used extensively by an Autodoc, and allowing bionic installation with minimal failure chance.  An integrated security subroutine renders it unusable after a single installation.
